description: A Mesh describes an instance of a single geometry mesh. It is an instance of a Prim Class.

members.name: closedU
members.description: Returns True if the mesh is closed in U, False otherwise.

members.name: closedV
members.description: Returns True if the mesh is closed in V, False otherwise.

members.name: numRows
members.description: Number of rows in the mesh.

members.name: numCols
members.description: Number of columns in the mesh.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the Mesh Class wiki page
